---
name: Rule or Pattern Proposal
about: Propose a new rule, pattern, or prohibition
title: "[PROPOSAL] "
labels: proposal
assignees: ''
---

## What This Addresses

Describe the failure pattern or risk this rule prevents.

## Real-World Evidence

Describe the incident or documented failure that justifies this addition. "It would be nice to..." is not sufficient.

## Proposed Addition

Which file would this go in? What would the text be?

## Impact

Does this affect existing rules? Does it add scope to the framework?
